nodes.title: about_app.py
nodes.full_text:
─── The Good Stuff ──────────────────────────────────────────
Separation of Concerns: Keeping your strings, versioning, and "About" text in a dedicated file is a pro move. It makes localizing or updating the UI much easier down the road.

Documentation: Your docstring and section headers (# ─── Core Identity ───) make the file very scannable.

nodes.title: Phase 1: Clean warm.py
nodes.full_text:
Keep: CozyNoteEditor class (used by WarmNode)
Remove: Old WarmNode class definition (now in node_types.py)
Remove: Any helper functions duplicated in base_node.py

nodes.title: Phase 1: Clean about.py
nodes.full_text:
Keep: CozyNoteEditor class (used by AboutNode)
Remove: Old AboutNode class definition
Remove: Duplicate utility functions

nodes.title: Phase 1: Search for orphaned functions
nodes.full_text:
_generate_fallback_title() patterns
Old animation setup code
Deprecated layout/resize logic

Use Find All References to locate unused code

nodes.title: Phase 2: Audit main_window.py
nodes.full_text:
Verify all imports point to correct modules
Should import from cozy.node_types (not cozy.warm or cozy.about)
Remove any stale imports from refactoring

nodes.title: Phase 2: Check canvas.py imports
nodes.full_text:
Verify using cozy.node_types.WarmNode
No stale references to old modules

nodes.title: Phase 2: Verify session.py imports
nodes.full_text:
NODE_TYPE_MAP complete: warm, about, image, render
Imports from cozy.node_types
No circular dependency issues

nodes.title: Phase 2: Check for circular imports
nodes.full_text:
node_types.py ↔ base_node.py
session.py ↔ node_types.py
main_window.py ↔ node_types.py

All should import in correct direction

nodes.title: Phase 3: Validate base_node.py core
nodes.full_text:
All 4 node types can inherit cleanly
paint_content() template method works for all types
Port system functional on all types
Shadow rendering bug is fixed

nodes.title: Phase 3: Validate node_types.py
nodes.full_text:
Each node has unique brush color
Each node has appropriate paint_content()
Each node's to_dict() includes type-specific fields
Font choices consistent (Chandler42, Lato)

nodes.title: Phase 3: Verify port.py integrity
nodes.full_text:
Input port color distinct from output port
Positioning logic compatible with all node types
No breaking changes needed

nodes.title: Phase 4: Test all save/load paths
nodes.full_text:
WarmNode: saves/loads with title and full_text
AboutNode: saves/loads (title-only)
ImageNode: saves/loads with image_path
RenderNode: saves/loads with source_node_uuids
Port visibility state preserved

nodes.title: Phase 4: Check data migration
nodes.full_text:
Old session files from before refactoring - still compatible?
UUID stability across save cycles verified

nodes.title: Phase 5: Review graphics_view.py
nodes.full_text:
Zoom behavior (Photoshop-style) working
Pan behavior (Middle mouse) working
Keyboard shortcuts (Spacebar, Backspace/Delete) working
No references to old node classes

nodes.title: Phase 5: Verify hover effects
nodes.full_text:
All nodes use same hover animation
(1.025 scale, 400ms, OutQuad easing)
Pen brightening works on all color schemes

nodes.title: Phase 5: Verify resize consistency
nodes.full_text:
All nodes respond to resize handle
Minimum size (50px height) enforced
Port positions update on resize
Shift+drag maintains aspect ratio

nodes.title: Phase 6: Remove dead code comments
nodes.full_text:
Any old animation attempts in base_node.py?
Legacy hover effects in warm.py/about.py?
Deprecated resize logic scattered around?

nodes.title: Phase 6: Verify docstrings
nodes.full_text:
base_node.py methods documented
node_types.py classes documented
session.py functions clear and accurate

nodes.title: Phase 6: Add architecture comments
nodes.full_text:
Top of base_node.py: explain template method pattern
Top of node_types.py: explain the 4 node types and use cases
Top of session.py: explain NODE_TYPE_MAP registry pattern

nodes.title: Phase 7: Check nodal.py usage
nodes.full_text:
Is cozy/nodal.py still used?
Check if referenced in main.py or elsewhere
Determine if it should be kept or removed

nodes.title: Phase 7: Check glow_frames.py usage
nodes.full_text:
Is cozy/generate_glow_frames.py still used?
Check if referenced in main.py
Determine if it should be kept or removed

nodes.title: Phase 7: Verify cozy/ folder is clean
nodes.full_text:
No duplicate node definitions
No dead animation helper files
No old resize/hover logic scattered around
Organized and minimal

nodes.title: Phase 8: Test node creation
nodes.full_text:
Create via menu (all 4 types)
Load from old session
Delete nodes (no orphaned objects)
All operations work cleanly

nodes.title: Phase 8: Test port interactions
nodes.full_text:
Toggle on all node types
Works after load/save cycle
Positions update correctly

nodes.title: Phase 8: Test image loading
nodes.full_text:
Valid image files load correctly
Invalid/missing files show fallback text
Image persists through save/load cycle

nodes.title: Phase 9: Git cleanup
nodes.full_text:
Remove unused files (old warm.py/about.py if fully replaced)
Or keep them for historical reference if you prefer
Commit when ready

nodes.title: Phase 9: Update documentation
nodes.full_text:
Update any README or architecture docs
Reflect the new node system structure
Include four node types: Warm, About, Image, Render

nodes.title: Phase 9: Final test run
nodes.full_text:
Create nodes, edit them, resize, hover, drag
Save session, close, reload
All features work smoothly
App is ready for next phase
